title: fraxinus quadrangulata
intro: Fraxinus quadrangulata, also known as Blue Ash, is a deciduous tree species native to eastern North America, characterized by its distinctive blue-gray bark and quadrangular leaflets. The medicinal properties of Fraxinus quadrangulata include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Fraxinus quadrangulata can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions like arthritis and digestive issues.
